author: gb9t
content:
Phase A part 1 written and verified:

- .design/00-baseline.md (factual anchor: pinned commit 27a26ccfd528, kernel 7.1.0-rc2, scope stats, refresh procedure)
- .design/00-overview.md (keystone contract: 12 REQs, 10 ACs, tiered doc layout, compat-contract enumeration table, 5 open questions)
- All upstream paths verified to resolve (one fix: fs/devtmpfs.c → drivers/base/devtmpfs.c)
- Both registered as knowledge pages tagged design-doc + foundation

Five open questions in 00-overview.md await user resolution before Phase A is complete:
  Q1: baseline pinning policy / refresh cadence
  Q2: strict CONFIG_MODVERSIONS binary-module compat (massive scope decision)
  Q3: driver coverage strategy (per-class vs per-driver)
  Q4: verification ambition (best-effort vs formal)
  Q5: kexec hand-off parity in / out

Pausing for review of these two docs before drafting 00-rust-conventions.md, 00-glossary.md, 00-index.md.
